compiled_state.title: Add review event emission to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md to add emit-review-result.sh calls at two exit points:

1. After "Review passed" in "After Review" section (~line 478): call with pass args (--pass-fail=passed --revision-cycles=0 --resolution-code-changes=0 --resolution-defenses=0 plus tier and overlay args from current orchestrator state)

2. After resolution loop success: call with resolution args (--pass-fail=passed --revision-cycles=<N> --resolution-code-changes=<M> --resolution-defenses=<D> plus tier and overlay args)

Each call is a bash code block using the shim: .claude/scripts/dso emit-review-result.sh with all args.

## TDD Requirement

Exemption criterion 3: prose workflow document modification with no conditional logic in the file itself. The behavioral content is in emit-review-result.sh (tested by Tasks 1 and 2).

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both exit points instrumented
  Verify: grep -c "emit-review-result" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Pass-path call includes pass-fail flag
  Verify: grep -A10 "Review passed" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -q "emit-review-result"
- [ ] Resolution-path call includes revision-cycles
  Verify: grep -B5 -A10 "resolution" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep "emit-review-result" | grep -q "revision-cycles"

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Both emit-review-result.sh calls added to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md. (1) Pass-path after 'Review passed' with --pass-fail=passed --revision-cycles=0 and tier/overlay args. (2) Resolution-path after re-review passes with --revision-cycles=REVIEW_PASS_NUM --resolution-code-changes/defenses and tier-final computed from RE_REVIEW_DEEP_FULL. All 3 acceptance criteria verified.
comments.author: Main
